LanguageData.ArchotechProtocolSurge.label: protocol surge
LanguageData.ArchotechProtocolSurge.description:
Force the oath's core routines into a short overclock. Work, research, and combat throughput spike briefly, then normalize.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.ArchotechLockstep.label: lockstep mark
LanguageData.ArchotechLockstep.description:
Mark a hostile target with predictive lock telemetry, reducing its mobility and evasive timing while increasing damage received.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.FrontierBulwarkPulse.label: bulwark pulse
LanguageData.FrontierBulwarkPulse.description:
Trigger a hardened defensive pulse tuned for frontier line-holding. Movement, resilience, and weapon handling improve for a short hold-the-line window.
created/edited by easyrim
